rulings.Case Title: PAUL H. MELBOSTAD VS. DONALD G FISHER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion In Support Of Application For Attys Fees
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JUNE 13, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANTS DONALD FISHER, JAMES SUTTON AND KEVIN HENEGHAN'S Motion In Support Of Application For ATTORNEY'S Fees IS GRANTED. - THE DECISIONS IN KETCHUM V. MOSES (2001) 24 CAL.4TH 1122, 1131; ROSENAUR V. SUPERIOR COURT (2001) 88 CAL.APP.4TH 260, 287 AND RAMONA UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT V. TSIKNAS (2005) 135 CAL.APP.4TH 510, 523 THROUGH 525 ESTABLISH FISHER'S RIGHT TO RECOVER ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. - LODESTAR IS THE APPROPRIATE METHOD TO DETERMINE THE FEES TO BE AWARDED (KETCHUM AT 1139), MEANING A CALCULATION OF THE NUMBER OF HOURS REASONABLY WORKED MULTIPLIED BY THE REASONABLE HOURLY RATE. FLANNERY V. PRENTICE (2001) 26 CAL.4TH 572, 584. THERE IS NO LEGAL OR FACTUAL BASIS TO ALLOCATE THE FEES AND COSTS AMONG THE PREVAILING DEFENDANTS. (RAMONA UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT SUPRA AT 525) - RECOVERABLE FEES INCLUDE FEES INCURRED IN ENFORCING THE RIGHT TO MANDATORY FEES. (KETCHUM SUPRA AT 1133-34) - FEES AND COSTS AWARDED OF $148,044.25 TO ACCOUNT FOR POSSIBLE DUPLICATION AND INEFFICIENCY. =(302/PJM/KD)

rulings.Case Title: GILARDO CORTES et al VS. WEBCOR CONSTRUCTION, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Pltf'S Reply Brief To Deft'S Oppos And Second Declaration Of Jonathan E. Davis In Support Of Motion For Leave To Court To File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JUNE 13, 2007, LINE 7. DEFENDANT WEBCOR CONSTRUCTION, INC.'S Motion To Strike PLAINTIFF'S Reply Brief To DEFENDANT'S OpposITION And Second Declaration Of Jonathan E. Davis In Support Of Motion For Leave To Court To File Second Amended Complaint IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE PLEADINGS ARE NOT STRUCK FOR THEY WERE TIMELY FILED AND ANY DELAY IN SERVICE HAS NOT PREJUDICED DEFENDANT. THE NEW ARGUMENTS AND FACTS PRESENTED IN THE PLEADINGS ARE STRUCK. =(302/PJM/X-JN)
